subject: Phase A: PostgreSQL Persistence Layer
description:
Implement PostgreSQL persistence layer for durable audit logging and cold storage:
- titan/persistence/postgres.py (PostgreSQL client wrapper)
- titan/persistence/audit.py (Immutable audit log)
- titan/persistence/models.py (SQLAlchemy models)
- alembic/ directory with migrations
- Modify hive/events.py to add PostgreSQL sink
- Modify agents/framework/base_agent.py for audit logging
